title: histogram
summary:
Fast multi-dimensional generalized histogram with convenient interface for C++14 
 !doclogocolor.svg Multi-dimensional generalised histograms with convenient interface Coded with . Powered by the Boost communityhttpswww.boost.org and the Scikit-HEP Projecthttpscikit-hep.org. Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0httpwww.boost.orgLICENSE10.txt. Supported compiler versions gcc 5.5, clang 3.8, msvc 14.1 Supported C versions 14, 17, 20 Branch Linux, OSX, Windows Coverage
